title: 400 error when using OpenAI Embeddings node
symptom: When entering 'text-embedding-3-small' in the OpenAI Embeddings node, a 400 status code is returned without any body.
not_this_if: Using a different model that works
root_cause: The error occurs due to an incompatibility between the OpenAI API version and the embedding models being requested. The self-hosted setup may not be configured to use the correct API version that supports these models.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable 'OPENAI_API_VERSION' to '2023-05-15' in your Docker run command.
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply the changes.
Try using 'text-embedding-ada-002' as the model name if the dropdown is still empty.
agent_instruction: Set the 'OPENAI_API_VERSION' environment variable to '2023-05-15' and restart the Docker container.
